name: Marketing
rollupNote: Marketing actuals arrive via external links from Rhythm (WEI Total Leads Revenue / WE Revenue Incoming), Ecomm-Carlos (# Leads), and Branding Search Console. Rollup is manual until those feeds are live.
agentNote: Carlos's Hermes agent can wrap this board — the agent layer is intentionally left open so Hermes can integrate as the automation layer for Marketing.

kpis.name: WEI Total Leads Revenue
kpis.nodataNote: Sourced from Rhythm (external workbook). Target not yet set on board. Pending marketing meeting.

kpis.name: WE Revenue Incoming
kpis.nodataNote: = Custom Genie + HPI revenue combined. Sourced from external links (Ecomm-CM and DxD HPI). Target not defined on board.

kpis.name: MKT-Sourced Revenue
kpis.nodataNote: Attribution model: Net-New 100% / Re-Engaged 50% / Influenced credit-only. Feed from Power BI report (a0600d56). Not yet live on board.
kpis.flag: MQL/SQL, Cost-per-MQL, AOV, Site-Conversion are net-new (not on this board today — live in Power BI/GA4/Search Console).

kpis.name: # Leads
kpis.nodataNote: Sourced from Ecomm-Carlos external workbook. Target not defined on board.

kpis.name: Branding Search Volume
kpis.note: 4,800/mo — real value from registry. Target not formally set on board.

gaps: MQL/SQL, Cost-per-MQL, AOV, Site-Conversion: live in Power BI/GA4/Search Console — not yet on board.
WEI Total Leads Revenue and WE Revenue Incoming: pending external link connections to Rhythm and Ecomm workbooks.
No formal target defined for any Marketing KPI on the current board.
Marketing is Tier 2 — full interface built; deep data deferred pending the marketing meeting.
